programme.title: What the Duck?-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: In the Mexican wilderness, two survivalists fight to stay atop the food chain. S10 E13.

programme.title: Don't Let the Jungle Bugs Bite-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Survivalists brave the caves of Columbian rainforest as they struggle with biting insects. S10 E15.

programme.title: You've Got Another Sting Coming-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: On a hot Brazilian island, aggressive anaconda and deadly stingray torment survivalists. S10 E03.

programme.title: Swamp Don't Care-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Jake and Melissa face snakes and alligators in a swamp in Florida. S10 E12.

programme.title: Bite Club-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: A survivor of animal attacks teams up with an elite hunter in the African feeding ground. S10 E08.

programme.title: Cicadas & Mulberries-WildFed
programme.desc: The host searches for wild ingredients and turns them into gourmet meals for loved ones. S02 E01.

programme.title: Costa Rican Rainforest-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls bravely tackles the dangers of the Costa Rican rainforest. S01 E03.

programme.title: Desert Survivor-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls will have to skin and disembowel a camel in an attempt to stay alive. S02 E02.

programme.title: Georgiaeastern Europe-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear is in the Caucasus Mountains driving a snowmobile out the back of a helicopter. S05 E03.

programme.title: Bears Top 25 Man Moments-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: A survival expert tries to survive the sweltering, crocodile-infested Northern Territory. S05 E02.

programme.title: Borneo Jungle-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear must descend dangerous cliffs and deal with heavy rain to survive in a Borneo jungle. S06 E04.

programme.title: Sahara-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Grylls faces extreme challenges as he consumes deadly scorpions to survive in the Sahara. S02 E01.

programme.title: Sahara-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Grylls faces extreme challenges as he consumes deadly scorpions to survive in the Sahara. S02 E01.

programme.title: North Africa-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear is stranded in Northern Africa and gets jugaad in finding water, food and a shelter. S04 E13.

programme.title: Norway: Edge of Survival-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls attempts to survive the conditions in Norway while equipped with the latest technology. S06 E03.

programme.title: Iceland-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls shows how to survive extreme conditions in Iceland through various methods. S01 E11.

programme.title: Costa Rican Rainforest-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls bravely tackles the dangers of the Costa Rican rainforest. S01 E03.

programme.title: Mexico-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls demonstrates how to survive in Mexico's Copper Canyon. S01 E12.

programme.title: Kimberley, Australia-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Grylls survives in the Australian outback by avoiding sun stroke and deadly crocodiles. S01 E13.

programme.title: Shooting Survival-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Adventurer Bear Grylls's camera crew goes to extremes to film his journeys. S04 E12.

programme.title: Alaska-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bears face extreme temperatures and avoid black bears in the Chugach Mountains of Alaska. S04 E05.

programme.title: The Inside Story-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls introduces his crew and shares behind-the-scenes details of their adventures. S04 E06.

programme.title: Alabama-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear is locked in the backwoods of Alabama where he navigates freezing white water rapids. S04 E02.
